nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

en.lifeSummary: Anna Eriksdotter Krummedige was born as the daughter of Erik Segebodsen Krummedige and Beata Johansdatter von Thienen. She had at least 3 sons and 4 daughters with Albrekt Bydelsbach.

fr.lifeSummary: Anna Eriksdotter Krummedige est née, fille d’Erik Segebodsen Krummedige et Beata Johansdatter von Thienen. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles avec Albrekt Bydelsbach.

de.lifeSummary: Anna Eriksdotter Krummedige wurde, als Tochter von Erik Segebodsen Krummedige und Beata Johansdatter von Thienen geboren. Sie hatte mit Albrekt Bydelsbach mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Anna Eriksdotter Krummedige è nata il come figlia di Erik Segebodsen Krummedige e Beata Johansdatter von Thienen. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie con Albrekt Bydelsbach.

ja.lifeSummary: Anna Eriksdotter KrummedigeはErik Segebodsen KrummedigeとBeata Johansdatter von Thienenの娘として生まれた。彼女はAlbrekt Bydelsbachとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Anna Eriksdotter Krummedige(은)는 Erik Segebodsen Krummedige(와)과 Beata Johansdatter von Thienen의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Albrekt Bydelsbach(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Anna Eriksdotter Krummedige nasceu filha de Erik Segebodsen Krummedige e Beata Johansdatter von Thienen. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas com Albrekt Bydelsbach.

ru.lifeSummary: Anna Eriksdotter Krummedige родилась. Её родителей звали Erik Segebodsen Krummedige и Beata Johansdatter von Thienen. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери от Albrekt Bydelsbach.

es.lifeSummary: Anna Eriksdotter Krummedige nació como hija de Erik Segebodsen Krummedige y Beata Johansdatter von Thienen. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas con Albrekt Bydelsbach.
